display.name: Weathered Signal Tree
display.short_description: An old signal tree still bears warning ribbons, trail knots, and a spray of bitter berries the birds somehow left behind.

choices.label: Pick the bitter berries
choices.summary: The fruit is harsh, but it quiets your stomach enough to keep moving.

choices.label: Study the warning knots
choices.summary: Trace the old path signs and learn what frightened the wardens out here.
